allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f'uid={d[\\"uid\\"]} title={d[\\"title\\"]}'\) for d in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f'  uid={d[\\"uid\\"]:45s} title={d[\\"title\\"]}'\) for d in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; dbs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  uid={d[\\"uid\\"]:45s} title={d[\\"title\\"]}'\) for d in dbs]; print\(f'\\nTotal: {len\(dbs\)} dashboards'\)")
